title: mentha × sativa var. palustris
intro: Mentha × sativa var. palustris, also known as marsh pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains high concentrations of p-menthane, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of marsh pennyroyal include its use as a natural digestive aid, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it beneficial for treating gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Traditionally, marsh pennyroyal can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to relieve stress and promote relaxation.
